content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
Deficit HSPU
5-5-5-3-3-3
*Build Up for Range

Metcon:
For Time:
500m Row
30 Burpee Box Jump Overs #60/50cm
500m Row
30 2DB Thrusters #2x22.5/15kg
500m Row
30 2DB Box Step Overs

CrossFit Strength
Part A:
Deadlift 5x5

Part B:
4 SuperSets:
10 Barbell Z-Press
8-10 Weighted Elevated Feet Ring Rows

Part C:
For Time:
15 Thrusters #43/30kg
10 Lateral Burpees Over the Bar
12 Thrusters #50/35kg
10 Lateral Burpees Over the Bar
9 Thrusters #60/42.5kg
10 Lateral Burpees Over the Bar
